prompt: Cinematic hyper-realistic close-up of a modern smartphone floating vertically against pure solid matte black background (#06101E). The screen emits a warm chartreuse-green (#D4FF00) glow onto the phone bezel. Orange (#F47920) light rays emanating from behind the phone like divine light. negative_prompt: readable text, brand logos, Instagram logo visible, TikTok logo visible, hands, person, face, watermark, cartoon, illustration, vector, bright white background, colored background, multiple phones, flat design
